sections.paragraph:
Ποντικός, ή, όν from Pontus (s. Πόντος; Hdt. et al.; Just., A I, 26, 5 [Marcion]) subst. (Socrat., Ep. 30, 14) of Aquila Π. τῷ γένει a native of Pontus Ac 18:2.

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

subst. subst. = substantive(ly)

Ep.

Ep. = Epistola/Epistula, when applied to letters mostly pseudonymous; various dates—List 5

  1. = epistle

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 852a

Πόντιος, ου, ὁ (Diod S 14, 116, 3; Plut.; SIG 797, 2 [37 a.d.]; OGI 656, 4) Pontius, the name of a Roman, originally Samnite gens, going as far back as the Samnite Wars (Cic., De Off. 2, 21, 75; Livy 9, 1), the nomen (middle, or tribal [gentile] name) of Pilate (s. Πιλᾶτος) Mt 27:2 v.l.; Lk 3:1; Ac 4:27; 1 Ti 6:13; IMg 11:1; ITr 9:1; ISm 1:2; Just., A I, 13, 3 al. WSchulze, Zur Geschichte latein. Eigennamen: GGAbh. V/5, 1904; JOllivier, Ponce Pilate et les Pontii: RB 5, 1896, 247–54; 594–600; MStern, The Province of Judaea: CRINT I/1, 68–70; J-PLémonon, Pilate et le gouvernement de la Judée:Textes et monuments, ’81. See Kl. Pauly IV 1048–50.

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

IMg IMg = Ignatius to the Magnesians—List 1

ITr ITr = Ignatius to the Trallians—List 1

ISm ISm = Ignatius to the Smyrnaeans, I–II a.d.—List 1

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

GGAbh GGAbh = Abhandlungen der Gesellschaft der Wissenschaften zu Göttingen—List 6

RB RB = Revue Biblique—List 6

CRINT CRINT = Compendia Rerum Iudaicarum ad Novum Testamentum—List 6

Kl. Pauly Kl. Pauly = Der Kleine Pauly: Lexikon der Antike—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 852
